title: Node Heartbeat & Upgrade Check
activity_flow: GUARD: if _running == true → return (loop already active)
GUARD: if !nodeId → await hello(); if !ok return hello result
ACTION: build body (node_id, env_fingerprint, pending counts, taskMeta)
GUARD: if no new secret returned → continue
BRANCH: heartbeat ok? YES → return true (auth restored)
NO (other HTTP error) → increment _consecutiveFailures, return {ok:false, error:'http_<status>'}
YES → store.writeInboundBatch(events mapped to {type, payload, channel:'evomap-hub'})
_shouldUpgrade: semver compare cur vs min, component by component
RETURN true if any cur[i] < min[i], false if cur[i] > min[i], false if equal
BACK IN tick(): BRANCH: _running still true?
key_methods: startHeartbeatLoop(intervalMs): entry point; sets _running; calls tick() immediately
tick() [inner async]: calls heartbeat(), schedules next tick with exponential backoff
heartbeat({_skipReauth=false}): POSTs to /a2a/heartbeat; handles 401/403 via reAuthenticate; processes hub response (events, upgrade, unknown_node)
reAuthenticate(): loops up to 2 attempts; calls hello({rotateSecret:true}) then heartbeat(_skipReauth:true)
hello({rotateSecret}): POSTs to /a2a/hello; stores node_id and node_secret
_shouldUpgrade(minVersion): semver compare PROXY_PROTOCOL_VERSION vs minVersion → boolean
key_relationships: heartbeat reads store.countPending, writes store.setState, store.writeInboundBatch, store.writeInbound
backoff_logic: interval * 2^_consecutiveFailures, capped at 30 min; resets to normal interval on success
upgrade_logic: _shouldUpgrade does semver (major.minor.patch) compare: returns true only if current < min
important_notes: Heartbeat body includes outbound_pending + inbound_pending queue depths from store
hub events written as inbound batch with channel='evomap-hub'
upgrade notification written as high-priority system inbound message
Timer uses .unref() to avoid blocking Node.js process exit
